title: Exposure propagation analysis
body: Mapping how sanctions or financial crime risk propagates outward through counterparty networks — identifying indirect exposure beyond first-degree associations.

title: Cross-chain adversarial tracing
body: Evasion-aware multi-hop transaction analysis across BTC, ETH, SOL, TRON, and DeFi/bridge ecosystems — maintaining attribution under deliberate obfuscation.

title: Network clustering & entity attribution
body: Identifying wallet clusters, shared-input heuristics, and entity relationships to build attribution chains across complex adversarial wallet structures.

title: Behavioural typology development
body: Codifying recurring threat actor behaviour — transaction patterns, wallet rotation, layering techniques — into documented typologies for investigative reuse and team enablement.

title: OSINT enrichment & infrastructure mapping
body: Combining open-source intelligence with on-chain data to build entity profiles, verify counterparty identity, and map infrastructure supporting adversarial financial operations.

title: Sanctions adjacency analysis
body: Assessing proximity to sanctioned entities across counterparty chains — nested exchange exposure, indirect SDN linkage, and high-risk jurisdiction exposure propagation.

title: Procurement ecosystem mapping
body: Strategic analysis of payment networks associated with sanctions-sensitive procurement — including dual-use technology and adversarial logistics pathways.

title: Threat ecosystem segmentation
body: Structuring adversarial financial ecosystems into component parts — actors, infrastructure, payment rails, and jurisdictions — to produce analytical frameworks usable across investigations.

title: Layered attribution workflow
body: Systematic approach to peeling back obfuscation layers — bridge transactions, mixer-adjacent behaviour, cross-chain hops — to maintain attribution chain integrity.

title: Escalation triage & routing
body: Structured prioritisation of intelligence signals by sensitivity, regulatory relevance, and complexity — with appropriate routing to compliance, legal, or senior review pathways.
